name: command
visual_summary: A command component with suggestions list and settings dropdown. Used for providing user-specific commands or options. A combination of a dropdown and list.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready command component with the following characteristics:

Name: command
Description: A command component with suggestions list and settings dropdown. Used for providing user-specific commands or options. A combination of a dropdown and list.
Style: default
Interactions: clickable, focusable
Tags: dropdown, list, command, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// elements/command.html
<div x-data="{
        commandItems: {
            suggestions : [
                {
                    title: 'Calendar',
                    value: 'calendar',
                    icon: '<svg xmlns=\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\' width=\'24\' height=\'24\' viewBox=\'0 0 24 24\' fill=\'none\' stroke=\'currentColor\' stroke-width=\'2\' stroke-linecap=\'round\' stroke-linejoin=\'round\' class=\'w-4 h-4 mr-2\'><rect width=\'18\' height=\'18\' x=\'3\' y=\'4\' rx=\'2\' ry=\'
